General.Name: Intrasense
General.Description: Intrasense S.A. designs and develops software solution for advanced visualization and analysis of multimodality medical images under the Myrian name worldwide. It offers the Myriad platform, a visualization solution that provides a suite of clinical tools and artificial intelligence algorithms for prostate, lung, and brain pathologies; and the Liflow solution, a, oncological imaging platform that automates the identification and measurement of lesions. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Montpellier, France.
